sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26436" key="didumo/qroos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐδῠμό-θροος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n26436.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">double-voiced,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐλός</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:234" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.234</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
